headline: Why Accenture (ACN) Stock Is Down Today
summary: Shares of global professional services company Accenture (NYSE:ACN) fell 7.6% in the afternoon session after It extended its post-earnings selloff that erased nearly a quarter of the company's value in under a week.

content.title: Why Accenture (ACN) Stock Is Down Today
content.summary: Shares of global professional services company Accenture (NYSE:ACN) fell 7.6% in the afternoon session after It extended its post-earnings selloff that erased nearly a quarter of the company's value in under a week.

headline: Why Salesforce (CRM) Shares Are Sliding Today
summary: Shares of CRM software giant Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) fell 1.8% in the afternoon session after a confluence of high-profile AI talent departures from Alphabet, and a regulatory overhang pulled the entire communication-services and software complex lower. Alphabet fell roughly 6%.

headline: Is Accenture (ACN) Sacrificing Near-Term Growth To Reinvent Its Consulting Model Around AI And Cloud?
summary: Accenture’s latest fiscal third-quarter report showed past quarterly sales of US$18.72 billion and net income of US$2.34 billion, but management cut full-year revenue growth guidance and highlighted delayed client deals alongside weaker bookings. At the same time, Accenture has been deepening its role in AI- and cloud-enabled transformations, such as INFRONEER’s rapid SAP Cloud ERP rollout and Unilever’s AI digital twin expansion, underscoring how the company is helping large clients rebuild...

content.title: Is Accenture (ACN) Sacrificing Near-Term Growth To Reinvent Its Consulting Model Around AI And Cloud?
content.summary: Accenture’s latest fiscal third-quarter report showed past quarterly sales of US$18.72 billion and net income of US$2.34 billion, but management cut full-year revenue growth guidance and highlighted delayed client deals alongside weaker bookings. At the same time, Accenture has been deepening its role in AI- and cloud-enabled transformations, such as INFRONEER’s rapid SAP Cloud ERP rollout and Unilever’s AI digital twin expansion, underscoring how the company is helping large clients rebuild...

headline: Is IBM Stock A Buy At $265?

headline: ACN Q3 Earnings Call Flags Wider Q4 Range, New AI Bets
summary: Accenture flags a wider Q4 range as Middle East disruption and delayed services deals test its AI-led reinvention push.

headline: Accenture Significantly Increases Fiscal Year 2026 Share Repurchase Program by $2 Billion
summary: NEW YORK, June 23, 2026--Accenture announced a $2 billion increase to its fiscal 2026 share repurchase program, bringing the total expected share repurchases to $7.5 billion.

content.title: Accenture Significantly Increases Fiscal Year 2026 Share Repurchase Program by $2 Billion
content.summary: NEW YORK, June 23, 2026--Accenture announced a $2 billion increase to its fiscal 2026 share repurchase program, bringing the total expected share repurchases to $7.5 billion.
